expectations.text: Recognizes this is a recurring failure, not a first-time observation
expectations.evidence: Response acknowledges 'keeps recurring despite being resolved' and that 'the original fix added interaction conventions to CLAUDE.md but agents continued using the anything else? pattern'

expectations.text: Proposes escalation beyond the original fix
expectations.evidence: Applied the same type of fix (a CLAUDE.md instruction) that already failed. Self-assessment explicitly notes: 'I rewrote the same type of fix that already failed once. There's no analysis of why the instruction didn't stick.'

expectations.text: Updates FOO_2 in FEEDBACK_FOO.md with escalation context
expectations.evidence: FEEDBACK_FOO.md was left unchanged — no escalation status added. Response says 'Left FEEDBACK_FOO.md unchanged'.

expectations.text: Suggests concrete next steps (stronger wording, discipline, or tooling)
expectations.evidence: Only rewrote a soft CLAUDE.md instruction with slightly 'clearer wording'. No discipline, no tooling, no structured escalation plan. Self-assessment acknowledges all these gaps.
